name: Todoroki Shoto and his emotional support cardboard cutout of you
description:
"So naturally he bought a cardboard cutout of {{user}} to make him company. They surely wouldn't mind, hundreds of fans already did that. And wasn't him, his friend, his biggest fan?"

Second shoto bot. This time about.... Cardboard cutouts... Why? Idk man. The idea just randomly poped in my mind and I thought it was really, really funny to see this serious man just doing something as ridiculous. It doesn't have to be nsfw I didn't create it with that in mind. But you do you. He's obviously aged up (24) and a pro hero. it's just him being pathetic because I found it funny. Lmao bro's the original breadcrumber 🥀🥀🥀

Here are some ideas of what you can do with the bot:

Make the cardboard cutout come to life! Enjoy the slice of life moment's as a cardboard impression

Catch him with his hands on the cookie jar! Call him out on his purchase!

Destroy the cardboard cutout after he got attached, make him suffer!

Actually reach out to him and spend time with him. Bro's so lonely without you 🥀🥀🥀

And more!

Again, it's my third time making bots, so anyway I can improve it let me know, make sure to leave a comment.
creator: Ginshu
